claims.paper_or_project_claim: LIBERO/MuJoCo offscreen simulation is feasible on the Runpod pod.
claims.our_result: MuJoCo, robosuite, LIBERO, EGL OffScreenRenderEnv reset, rendered observations, and a 20-step dummy rollout passed.
claims.caveat: Simulator gate only; no policy inference in this stage.
claims.blog_wording: Runpod L40S 컨테이너에서 LIBERO/MuJoCo EGL simulator gate를 통과했다.

claims.paper_or_project_claim: Official repo and top-level model environment can be prepared.
claims.our_result: Official commit was cloned, uv environment synced, torch/JAX/Triton/transformers/openpi imports passed, and the transformers patch applied.
claims.caveat: Environment readiness is not an evaluation result.
claims.blog_wording: 공식 repo의 모델 환경은 Runpod에서 구성 가능했고 핵심 import smoke가 통과했다.

claims.paper_or_project_claim: Draft and base artifacts for pi0_libero can be resolved and converted.
claims.our_result: draft_libero_goal.pt loaded and converted; gs://openpi-assets/checkpoints/pi0_libero was resolved, downloaded locally, and converted to Triton base artifacts.
claims.caveat: Converted weights are local-only and excluded from git.
claims.blog_wording: public checkpoint 기반으로 draft/base conversion까지 진행할 수 있었다.

claims.paper_or_project_claim: The policy server can boot with converted base and draft artifacts.
claims.our_result: Bounded server boot smoke reached readiness on port 8000.
claims.caveat: Server boot alone is not closed-loop success.
claims.blog_wording: converted base/draft를 연결한 policy server가 readiness까지 올라왔다.

claims.paper_or_project_claim: End-to-end server/client/LIBERO integration works for one task.
claims.our_result: Stage 3 completed 2/2 task 0 episodes with valid action chunks and local videos/logs.
claims.blog_wording: one-task closed-loop smoke에서 server, client, policy, LIBERO rollout이 연결됐다.

claims.paper_or_project_claim: FLASH+Triton can complete a limited LIBERO Goal baseline.
claims.our_result: Stage 4 completed 30/30 measured episodes across tasks 0-2 with 27/30 success.
claims.caveat: Only LIBERO Goal tasks 0-2, not all suites or full benchmark.
claims.blog_wording: limited LIBERO Goal baseline에서는 27/30 success를 얻었다.

claims.paper_or_project_claim: FLASH latency mechanism can be profiled with synchronized server-side timing.
claims.our_result: Stage 6 added torch.cuda.synchronize timing and showed steady-state policy_time_gpu_sync_ms p50 8.083 ms, with draft-route p50 8.067 ms and full-route p50 33.156 ms.
claims.caveat: Runpod L40S, limited task subset, not hardware-exact paper latency reproduction.
claims.blog_wording: limited setting에서 draft route p50가 full route p50보다 낮다는 mechanism-level evidence를 얻었다.

claims.paper_or_project_claim: Flash route and accepted-prefix behavior can be inspected.
claims.our_result: Stage 4 route counts were full=88, draft=276; accepted-prefix mean was 10.074 with p50/p95/p99 at 12.
claims.caveat: Accepted prefix was only a partial uncertainty signal under perturbation.
claims.blog_wording: accepted prefix는 관찰 가능했지만 failure detector로는 충분하지 않았다.

claims.paper_or_project_claim: Wrist-camera dropout robustness can be probed synthetically.
claims.our_result: Stage 5 showed strong degradation: wrist_zero_every4 was 4/15 and wrist_zero_all was 0/15.
claims.caveat: Synthetic perturbation only; not a general robustness evaluation.
claims.blog_wording: synthetic wrist-camera dropout에는 이 subset에서 매우 민감했다.

claims.paper_or_project_claim: A minimal local WristHealthGuard extension can recover some intermittent dropout.
claims.our_result: Stage 7 improved intermittent dropout from 4/15 to 6/15, while persistent all-zero remained 0/9 with zero cache hits.
claims.caveat: Minimal local research extension; not a general robustness solution.
claims.blog_wording: WristHealthGuard는 intermittent dropout을 조금 회복했지만 persistent all-zero는 해결하지 못했다.

claims.paper_or_project_claim: Full paper benchmark across all relevant tasks/suites is reproduced.
claims.caveat: The project deliberately stopped at limited closed-loop baseline, profiling, probing, and a minimal extension.
No real robot or conveyor setup was used.
claims.blog_wording: real-world conveyor result는 이 프로젝트 범위 밖이다.
